stories.headline: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei: Iran's defiant leader's grip on power ends
stories.description: Iran's Supreme Leader killed in US-Israeli airstrikes, state TV confirms.

stories.headline: US-Israel attacks on Iran, day 2: Khamenei is killed, Iran retaliates
stories.description: Iran carries out retaliatory attacks as supreme leader is killed in US and Israeli attacks pushing the region on edge.

stories.headline: Violent clashes in Pakistan as US Consulate stormed over killing of Iran’s supreme leader
stories.description: At least six people were killed in clashes with police Sunday after hundreds of protesters stormed the consulate.

stories.headline: More blasts rock Dubai, Doha and Manama as Iran targets US assets in Gulf
stories.description: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on US assets in the region continue for a second day as fears of a wider conflict rise.

stories.headline: Trump's bet on Iranian regime change could be his biggest gamble yet
stories.description: The US president may be forced to wage a political battle at home while presiding over a new war in the Middle East.
